output:
# solution.py

"""
CulturalExchangeHub - A platform for collaborative cultural exchanges and learning.

Modules (built in dependency order):
1. User Registration & Profile Management
2. Virtual Tour Module
3. Language Learning & Practice
4. Cultural Workshop Module
5. User Feedback & Rating System
"""

import threading
import copy
import uuid
import time
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from enum import Enum
from typing import Optional, List, Dict, Any, Callable


# ─── Exceptions ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

class NotFoundError(Exception):
    """Raised when a requested entity does not exist."""
    pass


class ValidationError(Exception):
    """Raised when input validation fails."""
    pass


class AuthorizationError(Exception):
    """Raised when an action is not authorized."""
    pass


class DuplicateError(Exception):
    """Raised when a duplicate entity is detected."""
    pass


# ─── Enums ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

class UserStatus(Enum):
    ACTIVE = "active"
    INACTIVE = "inactive"
    SUSPENDED = "suspended"


class TourStatus(Enum):
    DRAFT = "draft"
    PUBLISHED = "published"
    ARCHIVED = "archived"


class SessionStatus(Enum):
    SCHEDULED = "scheduled"
    IN_PROGRESS = "in_progress"
    COMPLETED = "completed"
    CANCELLED = "cancelled"


class WorkshopType(Enum):
    LIVE = "live"
    PRE_RECORDED = "pre_recorded"


class ProficiencyLevel(Enum):
    BEGINNER = "beginner"
    INTERMEDIATE = "intermediate"
    ADVANCED = "advanced"
    NATIVE = "native"


# ─── Data Models ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

class User:
    def __init__(self, user_id: str, username: str, email: str,
                 password_hash: str, display_name: str = "",
                 profile_picture: str = "", cultural_background: str = "",
                 interests: Optional[List[str]] = None,
                 languages: Optional[Dict[str, str]] = None,
                 country: str = "", bio: str = ""):
        self.user_id = user_id
        self.username = username
        self.email = email
        self.password_hash = password_hash
        self.display_name = display_name or username
        self.profile_picture = profile_picture
        self.cultural_background = cultural_background
        self.interests = interests or []
        self.languages = languages or {}
        self.country = country
        self.bio = bio
        self.status = UserStatus.ACTIVE
        self.created_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
        self.updated_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc)


class Hotspot:
    def __init__(self, hotspot_id: str, name: str, description: str,
                 position: Dict[str, float], media_url: str = "",
                 media_type: str = "text"):
        self.hotspot_id = hotspot_id
        self.name = name
        self.description = description
        self.position = position
        self.media_url = media_url
        self.media_type = media_type


class AudioGuide:
    def __init__(self, guide_id: str, title: str, audio_url: str,
                 transcript: str = "", language: str = "en",
                 duration_seconds: int = 0):
        self.guide_id = guide_id
        self.title = title
        self.audio_url = audio_url
        self.transcript = transcript
        self.language = language
        self.duration_seconds = duration_seconds


class VirtualTour:
    def __init__(self, tour_id: str, title: str, description: str,
                 creator_id: str, model_url: str = "",
                 location: str = "", culture: str = "",
                 hotspots: Optional[List[Hotspot]] = None,
                 audio_guides: Optional[List[AudioGuide]] = None):
        self.tour_id = tour_id
        self.title = title
        self.description = description
        self.creator_id = creator_id
        self.model_url = model_url
        self.location = location
        self.culture = culture
        self.hotspots = hotspots or []
        self.audio_guides = audio_guides or []
        self.status = TourStatus.DRAFT
        self.view_count = 0
        self.created_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
        self.updated_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc)


class LanguageExchange:
    def __init__(self, exchange_id: str, user1_id: str, user2_id: str,
                 language_taught: str, language_learned: str):
        self.exchange_id = exchange_id
        self.user1_id = user1_id
        self.user2_id = user2_id
        self.language_taught = language_taught
        self.language_learned = language_learned
        self.status = SessionStatus.SCHEDULED
        self.messages: List[Dict[str, Any]] = []
        self.translations: List[Dict[str, str]] = []
        self.started_at: Optional[datetime] = None
        self.ended_at: Optional[datetime] = None
        self.created_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc)


class Workshop:
    def __init__(self, workshop_id: str, title: str, description: str,
                 host_id: str, workshop_type: WorkshopType,
                 culture: str = "", max_participants: int = 50,
                 scheduled_at: Optional[datetime] = None,
                 recording_url: str = ""):
        self.workshop_id = workshop_id
        self.title = title
        self.description = description
        self.host_id = host_id
        self.workshop_type = workshop_type
        self.culture = culture
        self.max_participants = max_participants
        self.scheduled_at = scheduled_at
        self.recording_url = recording_url
        self.status = SessionStatus.SCHEDULED
        self.participants: List[str] = []
        self.questions: List[Dict[str, Any]] = []
        self.discussions: List[Dict[str, Any]] = []
        self.created_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
        self.updated_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc)


class Rating:
    def __init__(self, rating_id: str, user_id: str, target_type: str,
                 target_id: str, score: int, review: str = ""):
        self.rating_id = rating_id
        self.user_id = user_id
        self.target_type = target_type
        self.target_id = target_id
        self.score = score
        self.review = review
        self.created_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
        self.updated_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc)


# ─── Shared State ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

class _State:
    def __init__(self, now: Optional[Callable] = None):
        self.lock = threading.RLock()
        self.now = now or (lambda: datetime.now(timezone.utc))
        self.users: Dict[str, User] = {}
        self.username_index: Dict[str, str] = {}
        self.email_index: Dict[str, str] = {}
        self.tours: Dict[str, VirtualTour] = {}
        self.exchanges: Dict[str, LanguageExchange] = {}
        self.workshops: Dict[str, Workshop] = {}
        self.ratings: Dict[str, Rating] = {}
        self.rating_index: Dict[str, List[str]] = {}


# ─── Module 1: User Registration & Profile Management ─────────────────────────

class UserService:
    def __init__(self, state: _State):
        self._s = state
        self._lock = state.lock

    def register_user(self, username: str, email: str, password: str,
                      display_name: str = "", **kwargs) -> User:
        with self._lock:
            if not username or not username.strip():
                raise ValidationError("Username is required")
            if not email or not email.strip():
                raise ValidationError("Email is required")
            if not password or len(password) < 6:
                raise ValidationError("Password must be at least 6 characters")

            username = username.strip()
            email = email.strip().lower()

            if username.lower() in self._s.username_index:
                raise DuplicateError(f"Username '{username}' is already taken")
            if email in self._s.email_index:
                raise DuplicateError(f"Email '{email}' is already registered")

            user_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
            password_hash = self._hash_password(password)
            user = User(
                user_id=user_id,
                username=username,
                email=email,
                password_hash=password_hash,
                display_name=display_name or username,
                **kwargs
            )
            self._s.users[user_id] = user
            self._s.username_index[username.lower()] = user_id
            self._s.email_index[email] = user_id
            return copy.deepcopy(user)

    def get_user(self, user_id: str) -> User:
        with self._lock:
            if user_id not in self._s.users:
                raise NotFoundError(f"User '{user_id}' not found")
            return copy.deepcopy(self._s.users[user_id])

    def get_user_by_username(self, username: str) -> User:
        with self._lock:
            key = username.strip().lower()
            if key not in self._s.username_index:
                raise NotFoundError(f"User with username '{username}' not found")
            uid = self._s.username_index[key]
            return copy.deepcopy(self._s.users[uid])

    def update_profile(self, user_id: str, **kwargs) -> User:
        with self._lock:
            if user_id not in self._s.users:
                raise NotFoundError(f"User '{user_id}' not found")
            user = self._s.users[user_id]

            if "username" in kwargs:
                new_username = kwargs["username"].strip()
                if new_username.lower() != user.username.lower():
                    if new_username.lower() in self._s.username_index:
                        raise DuplicateError(
                            f"Username '{new_username}' is already taken")
                    del self._s.username_index[user.username.lower()]
                    self._s.username_index[new_username.lower()] = user_id
                    user.username = new_username

            if "email" in kwargs:
                new_email = kwargs["email"].strip().lower()
                if new_email != user.email:
                    if new_email in self._s.email_index:
                        raise DuplicateError(
                            f"Email '{new_email}' is already registered")
                    del self._s.email_index[user.email]
                    self._s.email_index[new_email] = user_id
                    user.email = new_email

            simple_fields = [
                "display_name", "profile_picture", "cultural_background",
                "interests", "languages", "country", "bio"
            ]
            for field in simple_fields:
                if field in kwargs:
                    setattr(user, field, kwargs[field])

            user.updated_at = self._s.now()
            return copy.deepcopy(user)

    def upload_profile_picture(self, user_id: str, picture_url: str) -> User:
        with self._lock:
            if user_id not in self._s.users:
                raise NotFoundError(f"User '{user_id}' not found")
            if not picture_url or not picture_url.strip():
                raise ValidationError("Picture URL is required")
            self._s.users[user_id].profile_picture = picture_url.strip()
            self._s.users[user_id].updated_at = self._s.now()
            return copy.deepcopy(self._s.users[user_id])

    def deactivate_user(self, user_id: str) -> User:
        with self._lock:
            if user_id not in self._s.users:
                raise NotFoundError(f"User '{user_id}' not found")
            self._s.users[user_id].status = UserStatus.INACTIVE
            self._s.users[user_id].updated_at = self._s.now()
            return copy.deepcopy(self._s.users[user_id])

    def list_users(self, status: Optional[UserStatus] = None,
                   country: Optional[str] = None,
                   interest: Optional[str] = None) -> List[User]:
        with self._lock:
            results = list(self._s.users.values())
            if status:
                results = [u for u in results if u.status == status]
            if country:
                results = [u for u in results
                           if u.country.lower() == country.lower()]
            if interest:
                results = [u for u in results
                           if interest.lower() in
                           [i.lower() for i in u.interests]]
            return [copy.deepcopy(u) for u in results]

    def _hash_password(self, password: str) -> str:
        import hashlib
        return hashlib.sha256(password.encode()).hexdigest()

    def _verify_user_active(self, user_id: str) -> None:
        if user_id not in self._s.users:
            raise NotFoundError(f"User '{user_id}' not found")
        if self._s.users[user_id].status != UserStatus.ACTIVE:
            raise AuthorizationError(
                f"User '{user_id}' is not active")


# ─── Module 2: Virtual Tour Module ────────────────────────────────────────────

class VirtualTourService:
    def __init__(self, state: _State, user_service: UserService):
        self._s = state
        self._lock = state.lock
        self._users = user_service

    def create_tour(self, creator_id: str, title: str, description: str,
                    model_url: str = "", location: str = "",
                    culture: str = "") -> VirtualTour:
        with self._lock:
            self._users._verify_user_active(creator_id)
            if not title or not title.strip():
                raise ValidationError("Tour title is required")
            if not description or not description.strip():
                raise ValidationError("Tour description is required")

            tour_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
            tour = VirtualTour(
                tour_id=tour_id,
                title=title.strip(),
                description=description.strip(),
                creator_id=creator_id,
                model_url=model_url,
                location=location,
                culture=culture
            )
            self._s.tours[tour_id] = tour
            return copy.deepcopy(tour)

    def get_tour(self, tour_id: str) -> VirtualTour:
        with self._lock:
            if tour_id not in self._s.tours:
                raise NotFoundError(f"Tour '{tour_id}' not found")
            return copy.deepcopy(self._s.tours[tour_id])

    def publish_tour(self, tour_id: str, user_id: str) -> VirtualTour:
        with self._lock:
            if tour_id not in self._s.tours:
                raise NotFoundError(f"Tour '{tour_id}' not found")
            tour = self._s.tours[tour_id]
            if tour.creator_id != user_id:
                raise AuthorizationError(
                    "Only the creator can publish this tour")
            tour.status = TourStatus.PUBLISHED
            tour.updated_at = self._s.now()
            return copy.deepcopy(tour)

    def archive_tour(self, tour_id: str, user_id: str) -> VirtualTour:
        with self._lock:
            if tour_id not in self._s.tours:
                raise NotFoundError(f"Tour '{tour_id}' not found")
            tour = self._s.tours[tour_id]
            if tour.creator_id != user_id:
                raise AuthorizationError(
                    "Only the creator can archive this tour")
            tour.status = TourStatus.ARCHIVED
            tour.updated_at = self._s.now()
            return copy.deepcopy(tour)

    def add_hotspot(self, tour_id: str, user_id: str, name: str,
                    description: str, position: Dict[str, float],
                    media_url: str = "",
                    media_type: str = "text") -> VirtualTour:
        with self._lock:
            if tour_id not in self._s.tours:
                raise NotFoundError(f"Tour '{tour_id}' not found")
            tour = self._s.tours[tour_id]
            if tour.creator_id != user_id:
                raise AuthorizationError(
                    "Only the creator can modify this tour")
            if not name or not name.strip():
                raise ValidationError("Hotspot name is required")

            hotspot = Hotspot(
                hotspot_id=str(uuid.uuid4()),
                name=name.strip(),
                description=description,
                position=position,
                media_url=media_url,
                media_type=media_type
            )
            tour.hotspots.append(hotspot)
            tour.updated_at = self._s.now()
            return copy.deepcopy(tour)

    def add_audio_guide(self, tour_id: str, user_id: str, title: str,
                        audio_url: str, transcript: str = "",
                        language: str = "en",
                        duration_seconds: int = 0) -> VirtualTour:
        with self._lock:
            if tour_id not in self._s.tours:
                raise NotFoundError(f"Tour '{tour_id}' not found")
            tour = self._s.tours[tour_id]
            if tour.creator_id != user_id:
                raise AuthorizationError(
                    "Only the creator can modify this tour")
            if not title or not title.strip():
                raise ValidationError("Audio guide title is required")
            if not audio_url or not audio_url.strip():
                raise ValidationError("Audio URL is required")

            guide = AudioGuide(
                guide_id=str(uuid.uuid4()),
                title=title.strip(),
                audio_url=audio_url.strip(),
                transcript=transcript,
                language=language,
                duration_seconds=duration_seconds
            )
            tour.audio_guides.append(guide)
            tour.updated_at = self._s.now()
            return copy.deepcopy(tour)

    def view_tour(self, tour_id: str, viewer_id: str) -> VirtualTour:
        with self._lock:
            if tour_id not in self._s.tours:
                raise NotFoundError(f"Tour '{tour_id}' not found")
            self._users._verify_user_active(viewer_id)
            tour = self._s.tours[tour_id]
            if tour.status != TourStatus.PUBLISHED:
                if tour.creator_id != viewer_id:
                    raise AuthorizationError(
                        "This tour is not published")
            tour.view_count += 1
            return copy.deepcopy(tour)

    def list_tours(self, status: Optional[TourStatus] = None,
                   culture: Optional[str] = None,
                   creator_id: Optional[str] = None) -> List[VirtualTour]:
        with self._lock:
            results = list(self._s.tours.values())
            if status:
                results = [t for t in results if t.status == status]
            if culture:
                results = [t for t in results
                           if t.culture.lower() == culture.lower()]
            if creator_id:
                results = [t for t in results
                           if t.creator_id == creator_id]
            return [copy.deepcopy(t) for t in results]

    def get_hotspot_info(self, tour_id: str,
                         hotspot_id: str) -> Hotspot:
        with self._lock:
            if tour_id not in self._s.tours:
                raise NotFoundError(f"Tour '{tour_id}' not found")
            tour = self._s.tours[tour_id]
            for hs in tour.hotspots:
                if hs.hotspot_id == hotspot_id:
                    return copy.deepcopy(hs)
            raise NotFoundError(f"Hotspot '{hotspot_id}' not found")


# ─── Module 3: Language Learning & Practice ────────────────────────────────────

class LanguageLearningService:
    def __init__(self, state: _State, user_service: UserService):
        self._s = state
        self._lock = state.lock
        self._users = user_service

    def create_exchange(self, user1_id: str, user2_id: str,
                        language_taught: str,
                        language_learned: str) -> LanguageExchange:
        with self._lock:
            self._users._verify_user_active(user1_id)
            self._users._verify_user_active(user2_id)
            if user1_id == user2_id:
                raise ValidationError(
                    "Cannot create exchange with yourself")
            if not language_taught or not language_taught.strip():
                raise ValidationError("Language taught is required")
            if not language_learned or not language_learned.strip():
                raise ValidationError("Language learned is required")

            exchange_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
            exchange = LanguageExchange(
                exchange_id=exchange_id,
                user1_id=user1_id,
                user2_id=user2_id,
                language_taught=language_taught.strip(),
                language_learned=language_learned.strip()
            )
            self._s.exchanges[exchange_id] = exchange
            return copy.deepcopy(exchange)

    def get_exchange(self, exchange_id: str) -> LanguageExchange:
        with self._lock:
            if exchange_id not in self._s.exchanges:
                raise NotFoundError(
                    f"Exchange '{exchange_id}' not found")
            return copy.deepcopy(self._s.exchanges[exchange_id])

    def start_exchange(self, exchange_id: str,
                       user_id: str) -> LanguageExchange:
        with self._lock:
            if exchange_id not in self._s.exchanges:
                raise NotFoundError(
                    f"Exchange '{exchange_id}' not found")
            ex = self._s.exchanges[exchange_id]
            if user_id not in (ex.user1_id, ex.user2_id):
                raise AuthorizationError(
                    "Only participants can start the exchange")
            if ex.status != SessionStatus.SCHEDULED:
                raise ValidationError(
                    "Exchange can only be started from scheduled state")
            ex.status = SessionStatus.IN_PROGRESS
            ex.started_at = self._s.now()
            return copy.deepcopy(ex)

    def end_exchange(self, exchange_id: str,
                     user_id: str) -> LanguageExchange:
        with self._lock:
            if exchange_id not in self._s.exchanges:
                raise NotFoundError(
                    f"Exchange '{exchange_id}' not found")
            ex = self._s.exchanges[exchange_id]
            if user_id not in (ex.user1_id, ex.user2_id):
                raise AuthorizationError(
                    "Only participants can end the exchange")
            if ex.status != SessionStatus.IN_PROGRESS:
                raise ValidationError(
                    "Exchange can only be ended from in-progress state")
            ex.status = SessionStatus.COMPLETED
            ex.ended_at = self._s.now()
            return copy.deepcopy(ex)

    def send_message(self, exchange_id: str, sender_id: str,
                     content: str) -> LanguageExchange:
        with self._lock:
            if exchange_id not in self._s.exchanges:
                raise NotFoundError(
                    f"Exchange '{exchange_id}' not found")
            ex = self._s.exchanges[exchange_id]
            if sender_id not in (ex.user1_id, ex.user2_id):
                raise AuthorizationError(
                    "Only participants can send messages")
            if ex.status != SessionStatus.IN_PROGRESS:
                raise ValidationError(
                    "Messages can only be sent during an active exchange")
            if not content or not content.strip():
                raise ValidationError("Message content is required")

            msg = {
                "message_id": str(uuid.uuid4()),
                "sender_id": sender_id,
                "content": content.strip(),
                "timestamp": self._s.now().isoformat()
            }
            ex.messages.append(msg)
            return copy.deepcopy(ex)

    def translate_message(self, exchange_id: str, message_content: str,
                          source_lang: str,
                          target_lang: str) -> Dict[str, str]:
        with self._lock:
            if exchange_id not in self._s.exchanges:
                raise NotFoundError(
                    f"Exchange '{exchange_id}' not found")
            if not message_content or not message_content.strip():
                raise ValidationError("Message content is required")

            translation = {
                "original": message_content,
                "translated": f"[{target_lang}] {message_content}",
                "source_language": source_lang,
                "target_language": target_lang,
                "timestamp": self._s.now().isoformat()
            }
            self._s.exchanges[exchange_id].translations.append(translation)
            return copy.deepcopy(translation)

    def find_partners(self, user_id: str, language_to_learn: str,
                      language_to_teach: str = "") -> List[User]:
        with self._lock:
            self._users._verify_user_active(user_id)
            results = []
            for u in self._s.users.values():
                if u.user_id == user_id:
                    continue
                if u.status != UserStatus.ACTIVE:
                    continue
                user_langs = {k.lower(): v.lower()
                              for k, v in u.languages.items()}
                if language_to_learn.lower() in user_langs:
                    if not language_to_teach:
                        results.append(u)
                    elif any(language_to_teach.lower() == lang
                             for lang in user_langs):
                        results.append(u)
            return [copy.deepcopy(u) for u in results]

    def list_exchanges(self, user_id: Optional[str] = None,
                       status: Optional[SessionStatus] = None
                       ) -> List[LanguageExchange]:
        with self._lock:
            results = list(self._s.exchanges.values())
            if user_id:
                results = [e for e in results
                           if user_id in (e.user1_id, e.user2_id)]
            if status:
                results = [e for e in results if e.status == status]
            return [copy.deepcopy(e) for e in results]


# ─── Module 4: Cultural Workshop Module ───────────────────────────────────────

class WorkshopService:
    def __init__(self, state: _State, user_service: UserService):
        self._s = state
        self._lock = state.lock
        self._users = user_service

    def create_workshop(self, host_id: str, title: str, description: str,
                        workshop_type: WorkshopType, culture: str = "",
                        max_participants: int = 50,
                        scheduled_at: Optional[datetime] = None,
                        recording_url: str = "") -> Workshop:
        with self._lock:
            self._users._verify_user_active(host_id)
            if not title or not title.strip():
                raise ValidationError("Workshop title is required")
            if not description or not description.strip():
                raise ValidationError("Workshop description is required")
            if max_participants < 1:
                raise ValidationError(
                    "Max participants must be at least 1")

            workshop_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
            workshop = Workshop(
                workshop_id=workshop_id,
                title=title.strip(),
                description=description.strip(),
                host_id=host_id,
                workshop_type=workshop_type,
                culture=culture,
                max_participants=max_participants,
                scheduled_at=scheduled_at,
                recording_url=recording_url
            )
            self._s.workshops[workshop_id] = workshop
            return copy.deepcopy(workshop)

    def get_workshop(self, workshop_id: str) -> Workshop:
        with self._lock:
            if workshop_id not in self._s.workshops:
                raise NotFoundError(
                    f"Workshop '{workshop_id}' not found")
            return copy.deepcopy(self._s.workshops[workshop_id])

    def join_workshop(self, workshop_id: str,
                      user_id: str) -> Workshop:
        with self._lock:
            if workshop_id not in self._s.workshops:
                raise NotFoundError(
                    f"Workshop '{workshop_id}' not found")
            self._users._verify_user_active(user_id)
            ws = self._s.workshops[workshop_id]
            if ws.status == SessionStatus.CANCELLED:
                raise ValidationError(
                    "Cannot join a cancelled workshop")
            if user_id in ws.participants:
                raise DuplicateError(
                    "User already joined this workshop")
            if len(ws.participants) >= ws.max_participants:
                raise ValidationError("Workshop is full")
            ws.participants.append(user_id)
            ws.updated_at = self._s.now()
            return copy.deepcopy(ws)

    def leave_workshop(self, workshop_id: str,
                       user_id: str) -> Workshop:
        with self._lock:
            if workshop_id not in self._s.workshops:
                raise NotFoundError(
                    f"Workshop '{workshop_id}' not found")
            ws = self._s.workshops[workshop_id]
            if user_id not in ws.participants:
                raise NotFoundError(
                    "User is not a participant of this workshop")
            ws.participants.remove(user_id)
            ws.updated_at = self._s.now()
            return copy.deepcopy(ws)

    def start_workshop(self, workshop_id: str,
                       host_id: str) -> Workshop:
        with self._lock:
            if workshop_id not in self._s.workshops:
                raise NotFoundError(
                    f"Workshop '{workshop_id}' not found")
            ws = self._s.workshops[workshop_id]
            if ws.host_id != host_id:
                raise AuthorizationError(
                    "Only the host can start the workshop")
            if ws.status != SessionStatus.SCHEDULED:
                raise ValidationError(
                    "Workshop can only start from scheduled state")
            ws.status = SessionStatus.IN_PROGRESS
            ws.updated_at = self._s.now()
            return copy.deepcopy(ws)

    def end_workshop(self, workshop_id: str,
                     host_id: str) -> Workshop:
        with self._lock:
            if workshop_id not in self._s.workshops:
                raise NotFoundError(
                    f"Workshop '{workshop_id}' not found")
            ws = self._s.workshops[workshop_id]
            if ws.host_id != host_id:
                raise AuthorizationError(
                    "Only the host can end the workshop")
            if ws.status != SessionStatus.IN_PROGRESS:
                raise ValidationError(
                    "Workshop can only end from in-progress state")
            ws.status = SessionStatus.COMPLETED
            ws.updated_at = self._s.now()
            return copy.deepcopy(ws)

    def cancel_workshop(self, workshop_id: str,
                        host_id: str) -> Workshop:
        with self._lock:
            if workshop_id not in self._s.workshops:
                raise NotFoundError(
                    f"Workshop '{workshop_id}' not found")
            ws = self._s.workshops[workshop_id]
            if ws.host_id != host_id:
                raise AuthorizationError(
                    "Only the host can cancel the workshop")
            if ws.status == SessionStatus.COMPLETED:
                raise ValidationError(
                    "Cannot cancel a completed workshop")
            ws.status = SessionStatus.CANCELLED
            ws.updated_at = self._s.now()
            return copy.deepcopy(ws)

    def ask_question(self, workshop_id: str, user_id: str,
                     question: str) -> Workshop:
        with self._lock:
            if workshop_id not in self._s.workshops:
                raise NotFoundError(
                    f"Workshop '{workshop_id}' not found")
            self._users._verify_user_active(user_id)
            ws = self._s.workshops[workshop_id]
            if ws.status != SessionStatus.IN_PROGRESS:
                raise ValidationError(
                    "Questions can only be asked during an active workshop")
            if not question or not question.strip():
                raise ValidationError("Question content is required")

            q = {
                "question_id": str(uuid.uuid4()),
                "user_id": user_id,
                "content": question.strip(),
                "answer": None,
                "timestamp": self._s.now().isoformat()
            }
            ws.questions.append(q)
            ws.updated_at = self._s.now()
            return copy.deepcopy(ws)

    def answer_question(self, workshop_id: str, host_id: str,
                        question_id: str, answer: str) -> Workshop:
        with self._lock:
            if workshop_id not in self._s.workshops:
                raise NotFoundError(
                    f"Workshop '{workshop_id}' not found")
            ws = self._s.workshops[workshop_id]
            if ws.host_id != host_id:
                raise AuthorizationError(
                    "Only the host can answer questions")
            if not answer or not answer.strip():
                raise ValidationError("Answer content is required")

            for q in ws.questions:
                if q["question_id"] == question_id:
                    q["answer"] = answer.strip()
                    ws.updated_at = self._s.now()
                    return copy.deepcopy(ws)
            raise NotFoundError(
                f"Question '{question_id}' not found")

    def post_discussion(self, workshop_id: str, user_id: str,
                        content: str) -> Workshop:
        with self._lock:
            if workshop_id not in self._s.workshops:
                raise NotFoundError(
                    f"Workshop '{workshop_id}' not found")
            self._users._verify_user_active(user_id)
            ws = self._s.workshops[workshop_id]
            if ws.status not in (SessionStatus.IN_PROGRESS,
                                 SessionStatus.COMPLETED):
                raise ValidationError(
                    "Discussions only allowed during or after workshop")
            if not content or not content.strip():
                raise ValidationError("Discussion content is required")

            disc = {
                "discussion_id": str(uuid.uuid4()),
                "user_id": user_id,
                "content": content.strip(),
                "timestamp": self._s.now().isoformat()
            }
            ws.discussions.append(disc)
            ws.updated_at = self._s.now()
            return copy.deepcopy(ws)

    def list_workshops(self, status: Optional[SessionStatus] = None,
                       culture: Optional[str] = None,
                       workshop_type: Optional[WorkshopType] = None,
                       host_id: Optional[str] = None
                       ) -> List[Workshop]:
        with self._lock:
            results = list(self._s.workshops.values())
            if status:
                results = [w for w in results if w.status == status]
            if culture:
                results = [w for w in results
                           if w.culture.lower() == culture.lower()]
            if workshop_type:
                results = [w for w in results
                           if w.workshop_type == workshop_type]
            if host_id:
                results = [w for w in results
                           if w.host_id == host_id]
            return [copy.deepcopy(w) for w in results]


# ─── Module 5: User Feedback & Rating System ──────────────────────────────────

class FeedbackService:
    def __init__(self, state: _State, user_service: UserService):
        self._s = state
        self._lock = state.lock
        self._users = user_service

    def submit_rating(self, user_id: str, target_type: str,
                      target_id: str, score: int,
                      review: str = "") -> Rating:
        with self._lock:
            self._users._verify_user_active(user_id)
            if target_type not in ("tour", "exchange", "workshop"):
                raise ValidationError(
                    "Target type must be 'tour', 'exchange', or 'workshop'")
            if not isinstance(score, int) or isinstance(score, bool):
                raise ValidationError("Score must be an integer")
            if score < 1 or score > 5:
                raise ValidationError("Score must be between 1 and 5")

            self._verify_target_exists(target_type, target_id)
            self._check_duplicate_rating(user_id, target_type, target_id)

            rating_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
            rating = Rating(
                rating_id=rating_id,
                user_id=user_id,
                target_type=target_type,
                target_id=target_id,
                score=score,
                review=review
            )
            self._s.ratings[rating_id] = rating

            key = f"{target_type}:{target_id}"
            if key not in self._s.rating_index:
                self._s.rating_index[key] = []
            self._s.rating_index[key].append(rating_id)
            return copy.deepcopy(rating)

    def get_rating(self, rating_id: str) -> Rating:
        with self._lock:
            if rating_id not in self._s.ratings:
                raise NotFoundError(
                    f"Rating '{rating_id}' not found")
            return copy.deepcopy(self._s.ratings[rating_id])

    def update_rating(self, rating_id: str, user_id: str,
                      score: Optional[int] = None,
                      review: Optional[str] = None) -> Rating:
        with self._lock:
            if rating_id not in self._s.ratings:
                raise NotFoundError(
                    f"Rating '{rating_id}' not found")
            rating = self._s.ratings[rating_id]
            if rating.user_id != user_id:
                raise AuthorizationError(
                    "Only the author can update this rating")
            if score is not None:
                if not isinstance(score, int) or isinstance(score, bool):
                    raise ValidationError("Score must be an integer")
                if score < 1 or score > 5:
                    raise ValidationError(
                        "Score must be between 1 and 5")
                rating.score = score
            if review is not None:
                rating.review = review
            rating.updated_at = self._s.now()
            return copy.deepcopy(rating)

    def delete_rating(self, rating_id: str, user_id: str) -> None:
        with self._lock:
            if rating_id not in self._s.ratings:
                raise NotFoundError(
                    f"Rating '{rating_id}' not found")
            rating = self._s.ratings[rating_id]
            if rating.user_id != user_id:
                raise AuthorizationError(
                    "Only the author can delete this rating")
            key = f"{rating.target_type}:{rating.target_id}"
            if key in self._s.rating_index:
                self._s.rating_index[key] = [
                    r for r in self._s.rating_index[key]
                    if r != rating_id]
            del self._s.ratings[rating_id]

    def get_ratings_for_target(self, target_type: str,
                               target_id: str) -> List[Rating]:
        with self._lock:
            key = f"{target_type}:{target_id}"
            rating_ids = self._s.rating_index.get(key, [])
            return [copy.deepcopy(self._s.ratings[rid])
                    for rid in rating_ids
                    if rid in self._s.ratings]

    def get_average_rating(self, target_type: str,
                           target_id: str) -> float:
        with self._lock:
            key = f"{target_type}:{target_id}"
            rating_ids = self._s.rating_index.get(key, [])
            scores = [self._s.ratings[rid].score
                      for rid in rating_ids
                      if rid in self._s.ratings]
            if not scores:
                return 0.0
            return sum(scores) / len(scores)

    def get_user_ratings(self, user_id: str) -> List[Rating]:
        with self._lock:
            results = [r for r in self._s.ratings.values()
                       if r.user_id == user_id]
            return [copy.deepcopy(r) for r in results]

    def get_platform_stats(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        with self._lock:
            all_ratings = list(self._s.ratings.values())
            if not all_ratings:
                return {
                    "total_ratings": 0,
                    "average_score": 0.0,
                    "ratings_by_type": {},
                    "score_distribution": {i: 0 for i in range(1, 6)}
                }
            scores = [r.score for r in all_ratings]
            by_type: Dict[str, List[int]] = {}
            distribution = {i: 0 for i in range(1, 6)}
            for r in all_ratings:
                by_type.setdefault(r.target_type, []).append(r.score)
                distribution[r.score] += 1
            type_stats = {
                t: {"count": len(s), "average": sum(s) / len(s)}
                for t, s in by_type.items()
            }
            return {
                "total_ratings": len(all_ratings),
                "average_score": sum(scores) / len(scores),
                "ratings_by_type": type_stats,
                "score_distribution": distribution
            }

    def _verify_target_exists(self, target_type: str,
                              target_id: str) -> None:
        if target_type == "tour":
            if target_id not in self._s.tours:
                raise NotFoundError(
                    f"Tour '{target_id}' not found")
        elif target_type == "exchange":
            if target_id not in self._s.exchanges:
                raise NotFoundError(
                    f"Exchange '{target_id}' not found")
        elif target_type == "workshop":
            if target_id not in self._s.workshops:
                raise NotFoundError(
                    f"Workshop '{target_id}' not found")

    def _check_duplicate_rating(self, user_id: str, target_type: str,
                                target_id: str) -> None:
        key = f"{target_type}:{target_id}"
        for rid in self._s.rating_index.get(key, []):
            if rid in self._s.ratings:
                if self._s.ratings[rid].user_id == user_id:
                    raise DuplicateError(
                        "User has already rated this item")


# ─── Main Hub Facade ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

class CulturalExchangeHub:
    """Main facade integrating all modules."""

    def __init__(self, now: Optional[Callable] = None):
        self._state = _State(now=now)
        self._lock = self._state.lock

        # Module 1: User Registration & Profile Management
        self.users = UserService(self._state)

        # Module 2: Virtual Tour (depends on users)
        self.tours = VirtualTourService(self._state, self.users)

        # Module 3: Language Learning (depends on tours/users)
        self.languages = LanguageLearningService(self._state, self.users)

        # Module 4: Cultural Workshops (depends on language learning)
        self.workshops = WorkshopService(self._state, self.users)

        # Module 5: Feedback & Ratings (depends on all above)
        self.feedback = FeedbackService(self._state, self.users)


# ─── Smoke Test ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

if __name__ == "__main__":
    hub = CulturalExchangeHub()

    # Register users
    u1 = hub.users.register_user(
        "sakura", "sakura@example.com", "pass123",
        cultural_background="Japanese",
        interests=["tea ceremony", "origami"],
        languages={"Japanese": "native", "English": "advanced"},
        country="Japan"
    )
    u2 = hub.users.register_user(
        "carlos", "carlos@example.com", "pass456",
        cultural_background="Mexican",
        interests=["cooking", "music"],
        languages={"Spanish": "native", "English": "intermediate"},
        country="Mexico"
    )
    print(f"Registered: {u1.display_name}, {u2.display_name}")

    # Create and publish a virtual tour
    tour = hub.tours.create_tour(
        u1.user_id, "Kyoto Temples",
        "Explore ancient temples of Kyoto",
        model_url="https://models.example.com/kyoto",
        location="Kyoto, Japan", culture="Japanese"
    )
    hub.tours.add_hotspot(
        tour.tour_id, u1.user_id, "Golden Pavilion",
        "Kinkaku-ji temple covered in gold leaf",
        {"x": 0.5, "y": 0.3, "z": 0.0}
    )
    hub.tours.add_audio_guide(
        tour.tour_id, u1.user_id, "Kyoto History",
        "https://audio.example.com/kyoto-history.mp3",
        language="en", duration_seconds=300
    )
    tour = hub.tours.publish_tour(tour.tour_id, u1.user_id)
    print(f"Tour '{tour.title}' published with "
          f"{len(tour.hotspots)} hotspot(s)")

    # Language exchange
    exchange = hub.languages.create_exchange(
        u1.user_id, u2.user_id, "Japanese", "Spanish"
    )
    exchange = hub.languages.start_exchange(
        exchange.exchange_id, u1.user_id
    )
    hub.languages.send_message(
        exchange.exchange_id, u1.user_id, "Hola! Como estas?"
    )
    translation = hub.languages.translate_message(
        exchange.exchange_id, "Hola! Como estas?", "es", "ja"
    )
    print(f"Translation: {translation['translated']}")
    hub.languages.end_exchange(exchange.exchange_id, u2.user_id)

    # Workshop
    ws = hub.workshops.create_workshop(
        u2.user_id, "Mexican Cooking Basics",
        "Learn to make traditional Mexican dishes",
        WorkshopType.LIVE, culture="Mexican",
        max_participants=30
    )
    hub.workshops.join_workshop(ws.workshop_id, u1.user_id)
    ws = hub.workshops.start_workshop(ws.workshop_id, u2.user_id)
    hub.workshops.ask_question(
        ws.workshop_id, u1.user_id,
        "What spices are essential?"
    )
    print(f"Workshop '{ws.title}' started with "
          f"{len(ws.participants)} participant(s)")

    # Feedback
    r = hub.feedback.submit_rating(
        u2.user_id, "tour", tour.tour_id, 5,
        "Amazing virtual experience!"
    )
    avg = hub.feedback.get_average_rating("tour", tour.tour_id)
    stats = hub.feedback.get_platform_stats()
    print(f"Tour avg rating: {avg}, Platform total: "
          f"{stats['total_ratings']}")

    print("\nAll smoke tests passed!")
